TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Takaray a sowal == maramod O maramod hananay no 'Amis ko nika lacecay no fa'inayan ato fafahiyan. O tata'akayay a demak no lalafo no loma' ko nika raramod i niyaro'. Patala ko fa'elohay a mararamoday to titi no fafoy ato epah a pakaen to lalomaan no loma'. Matatakitakid ato masasipa'icep ko fa'elohay a maramoday. Mitolon a palemed ko faki to fa'elohay mararamoday ato nipainian. Masalipa:NoteTA ŚįéŤ®Ä Ono 'Amis a mararamod hananay i, o tadamaanay a sa'opo no 'Amis a finacadan, o kafana'an to matrilineal a sa'osi. itini i rayray no to'as, o fafahiyan ko mitongoday to tatirengan, pakayni i fafahi a mikadafo ato fafahi ko mitongoday to lekakawa, o loma' no fafahi i, o mato'asay ko mitongoden to fafahiay a wawa ano eca o matatodongay a teloc no fafahian. itini tona rayray no rayray no 'a'amisan, caay ko no fa'inayan ato fafahian a faloco' ko pararamod, o pakayniay to tayal no laloma'an, o tayal no niyaro' no niyaro'. caay ka lecad to no payrang a finacadan ko "piala to fafahi" hananay a harateng, o no pangcah a demak i, o "pialaay to fa'inayan" ko sapikadafo. ikor no pikadafo no fa'inayay a fa'inayn i, malinah tayra i fafahiyan a loma', malawawa no fafahifahiyan, pakayni i loma' no fafafahiyan mifalic to halafinay a tayal a sakanga'ay no 'orip ato sakacifaloco' no finacadan. talacowa mihakelong to no aniniay ato no holamin kowan kwan kwan kwan kwan a lekakawa, adihay to ko kasasiromaroma no kararamod no anini a pangcah, nika itini i ilisin a tata'akay a lisin, mahapinang to ko pinangan no fafa'inayan ato fa'inangay a demak. "Śģ∂"(Luma'),ŤÄĆ"Śģ∂" o sa'ayaway a lalosidan no 'amis i, o loma', o fafahiyan ko saka'orip no loma', ano caay katatodong ko sakakaay a fafahi i, o fa'inayan ko cacitodong to 'orip no fafahi. Masalipa: (Ngasa') (Itini), (Selal) (Ś¶ā Pakarongay Masalipa: ('Alufo): Masalipa: (Pikating) (Mipahafay): Masalipa: Masalipa: . Ť≤ĽÁĺÖÁ¶ģ(Raleigh Ferrell)(1969)."ŚŹįÁĀ£ŚéüšĹŹśįĎśĖáŚĆĖŤ™Ć".
S.PHON: == takaraj a so~uwa…ĺ == maramo~u…¨~…ģ o~u maramo~u…¨~…ģ ńßananaj no~u °amis ko~u nika …ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj no~u fa °inajan ato~u fafańßijan. o~u tata °akajaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u …ĺa…ĺafo~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° ko~u nika raramo~u…¨~…ģ i nijaro~u °. pata…ĺa ko~u fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj a mararamo~u…¨~…ģaj to~u titi no~u fafo~uj ato~u …ôpańß a paka…ôn to~u …ĺa…ĺo~umaan no~u …ĺo~uma °. matatakitaki…¨~…ģ ato~u masasipa °i ¶…ôp ko~u fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj a maramo~u…¨~…ģaj. mito~u…ĺo~un a pa…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ ko~u faki to~u fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj mararamo~u…¨~…ģaj ato~u nipainian. masa…ĺipa:no~ut…ôta ** o~uno~u °amis a mararamo~u…¨~…ģ ńßananaj i, o~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a sa °o~upo~u no~u °amis a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, o~u kafana °an to~u matri…ĺin…ôa…ĺ a sa °o~usi. itini i rajraj no~u to~u °as, o~u fafańßijan ko~u mito~uŇčo~u…¨~…ģaj to~u tatir…ôŇčan, pakajni i fafańßi a mika…¨~…ģafo~u ato~u fafańßi ko~u mito~uŇčo~u…¨~…ģaj to~u …ĺ…ôkakawa, o~u …ĺo~uma ° no~u fafańßi i, o~u mato~u °asaj ko~u mito~uŇčo~u…¨~…ģ…ôn to~u fafańßiaj a wawa ano~u …ô ¶a o~u matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u fafańßian. itini to~una rajraj no~u rajraj no~u °a °amisan, ¶aaj ko~u no~u fa °inajan ato~u fafańßian a fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ko~u pararamo~u…¨~…ģ, o~u pakajniaj to~u taja…ĺ no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an, o~u taja…ĺ no~u nijaro~u ° no~u nijaro~u °. ¶aaj ka …ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u no~u pajraŇč a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ko~u "pia…ĺa to~u fafańßi" ńßananaj a ńßarat…ôŇč, o~u no~u paŇč ¶ańß a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, o~u "pia…ĺaaj to~u fa °inajan" ko~u sapika…¨~…ģafo~u. iko~ur no~u pika…¨~…ģafo~u no~u fa °inajaj a fa °inajn i, ma…ĺinańß tajra i fafańßijan a …ĺo~uma °, ma…ĺawawa no~u fafańßifańßijan, pakajni i …ĺo~uma ° no~u fafafańßijan mifa…ĺi ¶ to~u ńßa…ĺafinaj a taja…ĺ a sakaŇča °aj no~u °o~urip ato~u saka ¶ifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa mińßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč to~u no~u aniniaj ato~u no~u ńßo~u…ĺamin ko~uwan kwan kwan kwan kwan a …ĺ…ôkakawa, a…¨~…ģińßaj to~u ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u kararamo~u…¨~…ģ no~u anini a paŇč ¶ańß, nika itini i i…ĺisin a tata °akaj a …ĺisin, mańßapinaŇč to~u ko~u pinaŇčan no~u fafa °inajan ato~u fa °inaŇčaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak. "*"(…ĺo~u~uma °),*"*" o~u sa °ajawaj a …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan no~u °amis i, o~u …ĺo~uma °, o~u fafańßijan ko~u saka °o~urip no~u …ĺo~uma °, ano~u ¶aaj katato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~u sakakaaj a fafańßi i, o~u fa °inajan ko~u ¶a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u °o~urip no~u fafańßi. masa…ĺipa: (Ňčasa °) (itini), (s…ô…ĺa…ĺ) (* pakaro~uŇčaj masa…ĺipa: ( °a…ĺo~u~ufo~u): masa…ĺipa: (pikatiŇč) (mipańßafaj): masa…ĺipa: masa…ĺipa: . ***(ra…ĺ…ôi*ńß f…ôrr…ô…ĺ…ĺ)(****)."********".
S.FORM: == Takaray a sowal == maramod O maramod hananay no 'Amis ko nika lacecay no fa'inayan ato fafahiyan. O tata'akayay a demak no lalafo no loma' ko nika raramod i niyaro'. Patala ko fa'elohay a mararamoday to titi no fafoy ato epah a pakaen to lalomaan no loma'. Matatakitakid ato masasipa'icep ko fa'elohay a maramoday. Mitolon a palemed ko faki to fa'elohay mararamoday ato nipainian. Masalipa:NoteTA ŚįéŤ®Ä Ono 'Amis a mararamod hananay i, o tadamaanay a sa'opo no 'Amis a finacadan, o kafana'an to matrilineal a sa'osi. itini i rayray no to'as, o fafahiyan ko mitongoday to tatirengan, pakayni i fafahi a mikadafo ato fafahi ko mitongoday to lekakawa, o loma' no fafahi i, o mato'asay ko mitongoden to fafahiay a wawa ano eca o matatodongay a teloc no fafahian. itini tona rayray no rayray no 'a'amisan, caay ko no fa'inayan ato fafahian a faloco' ko pararamod, o pakayniay to tayal no laloma'an, o tayal no niyaro' no niyaro'. caay ka lecad to no payrang a finacadan ko "piala to fafahi" hananay a harateng, o no pangcah a demak i, o "pialaay to fa'inayan" ko sapikadafo. ikor no pikadafo no fa'inayay a fa'inayn i, malinah tayra i fafahiyan a loma', malawawa no fafahifahiyan, pakayni i loma' no fafafahiyan mifalic to halafinay a tayal a sakanga'ay no 'orip ato sakacifaloco' no finacadan. talacowa mihakelong to no aniniay ato no holamin kowan kwan kwan kwan kwan a lekakawa, adihay to ko kasasiromaroma no kararamod no anini a pangcah, nika itini i ilisin a tata'akay a lisin, mahapinang to ko pinangan no fafa'inayan ato fa'inangay a demak. "Śģ∂"(Luma'),ŤÄĆ"Śģ∂" o sa'ayaway a lalosidan no 'amis i, o loma', o fafahiyan ko saka'orip no loma', ano caay katatodong ko sakakaay a fafahi i, o fa'inayan ko cacitodong to 'orip no fafahi. ° ko~u nika raramo~u…¨~…ģ i nijaro~u °. pata…ĺa ko~u fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj a mararamo~u…¨~…ģaj to~u titi no~u fafo~uj ato~u …ôpańß a paka…ôn to~u …ĺa…ĺo~umaan no~u …ĺo~uma °. matatakitaki…¨~…ģ ato~u mito~uŇčo~u…¨~…ģaj to~u tatir…ôŇčan, pakajni i fafańßi a mika…¨~…ģafo~u ato~u fafańßi ko~u mito~uŇčo~u…¨~…ģaj to~u …ĺ…ôkakawa, o~u …ĺo~uma ° no~u fafańßi i, o~u mato~u °asaj ko~u mito~uŇčo~u…¨~…ģ…ôn pararamo~u…¨~…ģ, o~u pakajniaj to~u taja…ĺ no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an, o~u taja…ĺ no~u nijaro~u ° no~u nijaro~u °. ¶aaj ka …ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u no~u pajraŇč a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ko~u "pia…ĺa to~u fafańßi" ńßananaj a ńßarat…ôŇč, o~u no~u paŇč ¶ańß a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, o~u "pia…ĺaaj to~u fa °inajan" ko~u sapika…¨~…ģafo~u. iko~ur no~u pika…¨~…ģafo~u no~u fa °inajaj a fa °inajn i, ma…ĺinańß tajra i fafańßijan a …ĺo~uma °, ma…ĺawawa no~u fafańßifańßijan, pakajni i …ĺo~uma ° no~u fafafańßijan mifa…ĺi ¶ to~u ńßa…ĺafinaj a taja…ĺ a sakaŇča °aj no~u °o~urip ato~u saka ¶ifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa i…ĺisin a tata °akaj a …ĺisin, mańßapinaŇč to~u ko~u pinaŇčan no~u fafa °inajan ato~u fa °inaŇčaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak.
